creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
zi          2011-07-18 23:53:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/nagios-check_hp_bladechassis Makefile distinfo 
                                          pkg-descr 
  Log:
  check_hp_bladechassis is a plugin for the Nagios monitoring software which
  checks the hardware health of HP blade enclosures via SNMP.
  
  The plugin is only tested with the c7000 enclosure.
  
  WWW: http://folk.uio.no/trondham/software/check_hp_bladechassis.html
  
  PR:             ports/158577
  Submitted by:   rpsfa@rit.edu (me)
  Approved by:    tabthorpe (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.249     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/net-mgmt/nagios-check_hp_bladechassis/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/net-mgmt/nagios-check_hp_bladechassis/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net-mgmt/nagios-check_hp_bladechassis/pkg-descr (new)
